article_id.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_activeArticles.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["article_id"])) : article_id })()}}
article_id.label: Article

bb_state.buttonColor:
{{(() => { const tableData = tbl_activeArticles.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (
  currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' ? '#3B6D11' :
  currentRow.bb_state === 'IN_WORK'   ? '#854F0B' :
  currentRow.bb_state === 'REWORK'    ? '#A32D2D' :
  '#888780'
)) : 
  currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' ? '#3B6D11' :
  currentRow.bb_state === 'IN_WORK'   ? '#854F0B' :
  currentRow.bb_state === 'REWORK'    ? '#A32D2D' :
  '#888780'
 })()}}
bb_state.buttonLabel:
{{(() => { const tableData = tbl_activeArticles.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' && currentRow.bb_submitted_by && currentRow.bb_submitted_by.startsWith('COPY:') ? '⧉ Submitted' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' ? '✓ Submitted' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'IN_WORK'   ? '● In Work' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'REWORK'    ? '↩ Rework' :
'—')) : currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' && currentRow.bb_submitted_by && currentRow.bb_submitted_by.startsWith('COPY:') ? '⧉ Submitted' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'SUBMITTED' ? '✓ Submitted' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'IN_WORK'   ? '● In Work' :
currentRow.bb_state === 'REWORK'    ? '↩ Rework' :
'—' })()}}
bb_state.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_activeArticles.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["bb_state"])) : currentRow["bb_state"] })()}}
